ExecutionBackendType.description: Execution backend for container lifecycle operations.
ExecutionBackendType.title: ExecutionBackendType

StoreBackend.description: Persistence backend for the lifecycle service store.
StoreBackend.title: StoreBackend

host.description: Interface the HTTP server binds to.
host.title: Host

port.description: Port the HTTP server listens on.
port.title: Port

api_key.description: Legacy API credential accepted via the X-API-Key header or as a Basic-auth password. Empty disables api-key auth.
api_key.title: Api Key

auth_username.description: Basic-auth username for the dashboard and API. Auth is enforced only when both username and password are set (or api_key is).
auth_username.title: Auth Username

store_backend.description: Persistence backend for service records: 'memory' is ephemeral (dev), 'file' persists to store_path.

store_path.description: Path of the service-record store (file backend only).
store_path.title: Store Path

execution_backend.description: How containers are managed: 'docker_sdk' (full support), 'docker' CLI (status/logs only), or 'noop' (dry runs).

component_config_store_path.description: Path of the persisted per-component deployment configs.
component_config_store_path.title: Component Config Store Path

docker_socket_url.description: Docker API endpoint. Production runs behind a socket proxy: tcp://socket-proxy:2375.
docker_socket_url.title: Docker Socket Url

docker_sdk_timeout.description: Client-level timeout (seconds) for every Docker SDK operation (pull, create, start, stop, …). The default accommodates typical image pulls.
docker_sdk_timeout.title: Docker Sdk Timeout

disk_path.description: Filesystem path whose free space is reported on the dashboard; /host_root when containerised (host filesystem mount).
disk_path.title: Disk Path

disk_warn_pct.description: Warn on the dashboard when free disk space drops below this percentage.
disk_warn_pct.title: Disk Warn Pct

env_store_path.description: Path of the per-component env/secret store.
env_store_path.title: Env Store Path

secret_key_path.description: Path of the Fernet key encrypting stored secrets.
secret_key_path.title: Secret Key Path

config_yaml_store_path.description: Path of the per-component config template/values store.
config_yaml_store_path.title: Config Yaml Store Path

deploy_history_store_path.description: Path of the per-component deploy-history JSON store.
deploy_history_store_path.title: Deploy History Store Path

self_update_watchtower_image.description: One-shot updater image launched by the dashboard's 'Update server' button; keep the tag pinned.
self_update_watchtower_image.title: Self Update Watchtower Image

self_update_docker_api_version.description: DOCKER_API_VERSION exported to the one-shot updater. Watchtower 1.7.1's client defaults to API 1.25, below modern daemons' minimum, and panics without this.
self_update_docker_api_version.title: Self Update Docker Api Version

registry_check_ttl.description: Cache TTL (seconds) for registry manifest-digest lookups.
registry_check_ttl.title: Registry Check Ttl

registry_check_interval.description: Interval (seconds) of the background update-available check; 0 disables it.
registry_check_interval.title: Registry Check Interval

system_settings_path.description: Path of the operator-editable System Settings store.
system_settings_path.title: System Settings Path

log_level.description: Root log level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, or CRITICAL.
log_level.title: Log Level

gateway_base_domain.description: Base domain for the subdomain gateway (e.g. deploy.robotsix.net routes <component>.deploy.robotsix.net). Empty disables subdomain routing.
gateway_base_domain.title: Gateway Base Domain

volume_audit_enabled.description: Master switch for the periodic volume-growth audit.
volume_audit_enabled.title: Volume Audit Enabled

volume_audit_growth_threshold_pct.description: Volume growth (percent between scans) above which a finding is raised.
volume_audit_growth_threshold_pct.title: Volume Audit Growth Threshold Pct

volume_audit_min_delta_bytes.description: Minimum absolute growth (bytes) before a finding is raised — filters noise on small volumes. Default 10 MiB.
volume_audit_min_delta_bytes.title: Volume Audit Min Delta Bytes

board_api_url.description: Board API base URL for filing audit-finding tickets; empty disables.
board_api_url.title: Board Api Url

board_api_token.description: Bearer token for the board API.
board_api_token.title: Board Api Token

board_repo_id.description: Board repo id under which audit tickets are filed.
board_repo_id.title: Board Repo Id

caretaker_enabled.description: Enable the periodic caretaker pass (auto-update, health, and volume checks).
caretaker_enabled.title: Caretaker Enabled

mill_component_id.description: Component id of the mill instance the caretaker reports findings to.
mill_component_id.title: Mill Component Id

image_auto_prune.description: After updates, remove dangling images not needed for rollback.
image_auto_prune.title: Image Auto Prune

llmio_tier_config.description: Fleet-global mapping from llmio capability level (level1-4) to provider and model. Overridden by the System Settings store.
llmio_tier_config.title: Llmio Tier Config

chat_agent_audit_store_path.description: Path of the chat-agent mutation audit log.
chat_agent_audit_store_path.title: Chat Agent Audit Store Path

claude_auth_refresh_interval.description: Interval (seconds) between Claude auth credential refresh attempts; 0 disables background refresh.
claude_auth_refresh_interval.title: Claude Auth Refresh Interval
